titleStmt.title: SII 24.211: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 211. (A.R. No. 47 of 1936-37.) SAME WALL.

summary.p: Registers the sale deed of the lands purchased by Periyaperumāḷ alias Kāliṅgarāyar from Gōmaḍattu-Nārāyaṇa-Bhaṭṭar and his brother (vide Nos. 209 and 210) for the formation of the colony Kaliyugarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam named after the king. The details of date are the same as in No. 210.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu kumpanāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu trayodaśiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ vaṭakarai rājarāja vaḷanā(ḷa)ṭṭu pāccil kūṟṟattu kiḻpalāṟṟu brahmatecam perumāḷ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam śrī vik kiramacoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭarum Ivar tampi vayiṉateva paṭṭa ṉum Ivviruvom teṉkarai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu miḻalaik kūṟṟattu naṭuvil kūṟṟil śrī parāntakanallūrk kaṭṭikkuṟicci Uṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ
periya perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku krayadravy(ā)ccelavu kaiyiṭu kuṭutta paricā vatu . Ivar perumāḷ tirunāmattāl vaikkiṟa Akaram kaliyukarāmac caruppeti maṅkalattukku viṟṟa tiruvaraṅkavatikku kiḻakku vikkiramacoḻa vāykkālukkut teṟku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattum Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattum nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa kucavaṉ tiṭal puṉcey periya toṭṭappuñcey vāstuśeṣam Uḷḷiṭṭa puñcey kuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻuvatu
Ikkuḻi Eṇṇūṟṟu Eḻupatukkum Itiṉiṉṟa teṅkumā vuḷḷiṭṭa pala vṛkṣaṅkaḷukkum muliyamāka niccayittu viṟṟa paṇam 6 100 10 3 Ippaṇam Aṟunūṟṟu Orupattu muṉṟum koṇṭeṉ koṇṭa paricāvatu . muṉṉāḷ miṇṭarāṉa kaṇṭiyatevarkku l piṟitta paṇattukku nāṉ Eḻutik kuṭutta cātaṉappaṭi paṇam 5 100 10 8 kku Ic cātaṉappaṭi viḷai nilaṅkaḷilum puñceykaḷilum Ik kaṇṭiyatevarkku viṭṭa paṭṭippāḻ tiṭalil teṉkiḻakku teṅkukku vaṭakku veḷikaṟai
puñcey kuḻi nūṟum koṭṭur tiṭal puñceyil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilattukku nilai Aimpatu kuḻi nikki Itaṉ teṟku valaiyar kuṭiyiruppāṉa Iṭattu viṭṭa kuḻi I ku muṉṟum Ākap puṉcey kuḻi muṉṉūṟum Itaṉiṉṟa te muṉṟukkum kaḻitta paṇam nūṟu nikki niṉṟa viḷainilaṅkaḷum puṉceykaḷum teṅkukaḷum maṉaikaḷum viṭukaiyil Ivarkku kuṭuppitta paṇam nāṉūṟṟu Orupatteṭṭum kāraām picceṭṭu varatarācapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal Ippuñcey Uḷḷiṭṭavai koṇṭa cātaṉappaṭi paṇittuk kuṭuttuk kuṟai
yāy pattaṅki tiruvaraṅka māḷipaṭṭar puṇaippaṭṭa(ṭa) paṇattukku vāṅkik kuṭutta paṇam 7 10 2- m Iṟṟai nāḷil kaiyil paṟṟiṉa paṇam nūṟṟu Irupattu muṉṟu Ākap paṇam Aṟunūṟṟu Orupattu muṉṟum Ippaṭikaḷāl nerākap paṟṟikkoṇṭu krayadravyac cilavu kaiyile kuṭuttom Ivvaraiyaṉ periya perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyarkku komaṭattu nārāyaṇa(ṉa) paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉtampi vayiṉateva paṭṭa ṉum Ivviruvom . Ippaṭikku Ivai komaṭattu nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku komaṭam kecava paṭṭaṉe(e)ḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Ivai pirāmaṇar per
muppattu Iruvarkkum kuṭuttamaikku Ivai periya perumāḷāṉa kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu §Along this line after some space begins an inscription ‘koccaṭapaṉmarāṉa’ in one line ending with ‘ivviruvom ma[ṉ] ceyvi[va]’
Digital edition of SII 24.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
